name: Potato and Leek Casserole
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Leeks, well-scrubbed, cut into half-inch pieces
2 pounds Potatoes, red, unpeeled, sliced into thin rounds
1/4 cup Parsley or chives (or a mix of both), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a deep skillet, coat the leeks and carrots with olive oil. Cover and simmer over low heat until soft.
3. Add seasonings and stir well.
4. Layer an oiled 2 1/2-quart to 3-quart casserole (with cover) with one-third of the potatoes, then half the seasoned vegetables.
5. Repeat layering with the remaining potatoes on top.
6. Pour broth evenly into the casserole.
7. Cover and bake for 50 minutes at 375°F.
8. Uncover and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
9. Garnish with parsley and chives.
Variation: Substitute carrots with zucchini if desired. Half of the leeks can be finely chopped yellow onions.
